title: Senior Cloud Engineer (AWS / DevOps)
description:
We’re hiring a Senior Cloud Engineer to consult with one of the leading global financial services clients in Singapore. This is a role where you’ll support the build and scale of a secure, cloud-native engineers platform used by hundreds of engineers. You’ll be part of a high-performing tech team driving a multi-year cloud transformation initiative aimed at enhancing developer efficiency and platform reliability.


If you're an ex-developer who transitioned into Cloud or DevOps engineering and you’re passionate about solving engineers pain points at scale, this role is for you!


What You’ll Do

  • Build and support an internal AWS cloud platform as part of a cross-functional engineering team
  • Collaborate with engineers to understand workflows and improve engineers’ experience
  • Deploy and manage infrastructure on AWS using tools like Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes (EKS)
  • Develop automation pipelines and CI/CD workflows using GitHub Actions or similar tools
  • Integrate monitoring and logging tools like CloudWatch, Datadog, Splunk for observability
  • Maintain system performance, troubleshoot issues, and support platform scaling
  • Work closely with engineering teams across departments to enable smooth cloud migration and adoption

Must-Have Skills

  • 6+ years of hands-on experience with AWS, including EKS, IAM, EC2, Lambda
  • 3 to 4 years of experience in software development using either Python, Java, JavaScript, .NET, or C#.
  • Containerization tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm
  • Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code: Terraform or CloudFormation
  • Familiarity with CI/CD tools: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins or similar tools
  • Working knowledge of logging/monitoring tools: Datadog, Splunk, CloudWatch
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work across teams

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified / contacted.


EA Registration No: R21103843, Andrew Jonas Matthew

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA License No. 10C4544

ALLEGIS GROUP SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Our specialised group of companies includes: Aerotek, TEKsystems, Allegis Global Solutions, Aston Carter, Major, Lindsey & Africa, Allegis Partners, MarketSource, and EASi.
